Solihull Plumbing Services

Our Prices

We believe in transparent pricing. All prices include VAT.

  • Call-out charge: £60 (first hour)
  • Hourly rate: £75 per hour after first hour
  • Boiler service: from £85
  • Boiler repair: from £120 per job
  • Annual gas safety certificate: £70 fixed
  • Power flush: from £300

For a free quote on larger jobs, call us on 0121 123 4567.
